creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
This PR is stale and gmail seems to have caused me to send some
patches which didn't attach correctly.

I've opened a new PR which should have a nice working patch attached to it.

New PR: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=156204

This PR ought to be closed out in favor of the newer one which is more
concise and lacks the corruption of patches.

-john
